use_cases: Display file upload progress with real-time percentage updates in cloud storage applications
Show multi-file upload status with expandable details in document management systems
Provide success/error feedback after file uploads complete in web applications
Allow users to collapse/expand upload queue to save screen space
Support dismissal of completed uploads to clean up the notification area
ai_summary: A Google Drive-style upload toast component that displays real-time file upload progress with status indicators, file type icons, and expandable queue management. Features dark mode support and includes success/error states for multi-file uploads in SaaS and file management applications.
